title: Coordinates, Graphs, Functions, and Rates of Change · Transfer Challenge
summary: Model water use, travel, cost, and capacity from tables, graphs, formulas, and descriptions. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a multi-representation resource dashboard with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Plot and interpret ordered pairs with axis quantities, units, origin, and scale.
Determine whether a relationship is a function and define practical input and output domains.
Translate a relationship among words, tables, graphs, and formulas while preserving meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Produce a checked model result
steps.instruction: A model passes through (3, 11) and (7, 23). Calculate its average rate of change. Use the result to decide Intercept Domain for a multi-representation resource dashboard.
